tasks.subject: Task 1: Parse temporal params + TemporalFilter helper + Histogram/RenderParams helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the genome's temporal_samples / temporal_filter_type / temporal_filter_width / temporal_filter_exp first-class (parsed, modeled, round-tripped) + TemporalFilter.samples(_:type:width:exp:) — a faithful port of flam3_create_temporal_filter (filters.c:409-450) returning UN-NORMALIZED weights (box=1.0 each; gaussian max-normalized to 1.0) + the sumfilt scalar (Σweights/N). Also add Histogram.scale(by:) + Histogram.accumulate(_:) + RenderParams.settingSamplesPerPixel(_:) builder.

**Files:** Modify Sources/FlameKit/Genome.swift (Quality ~111), Flam3Parser.swift (makeFlame ~140), Flam3Serializer.swift (~30), RenderTypes.swift (Histogram + RenderParams builders). Create Sources/FlameReference/TemporalFilter.swift, Tests/FlameReferenceTests/TemporalFilterTests.swift. Extend Tests/FlameKitTests/RealGenomePaletteTests.swift.

**Acceptance Criteria:** temporal_samples=1000/box/1.2/exp=0 parses correctly (matches all real fixtures, verified); TemporalFilter.samples(4, box, 1.2, 0) returns 4 weights each EXACTLY 1.0 (NOT 1/N) + deltas evenly spaced across [-0.6, +0.6] (span 1.2) + sumfilt=1.0; samples(1, box, 1, 0) returns [(0, 1.0)] with sumfilt=1.0 (identity, filters.c:419-423); samples(8, gaussian, 1.2, 0) returns weights max-normalized to 1.0 with sumfilt<1.0; serializer round-trips all four attrs; Histogram.accumulate precondition-errors on grid mismatch; RenderParams.settingSamplesPerPixel preserves `let`+Sendable+Equatable.

**Verify:** swift test --filter TemporalFilterTests --filter RealGenomePaletteTests --filter SerializerTests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/FlameKit/Genome.swift", "Sources/FlameKit/Flam3Parser.swift", "Sources/FlameKit/Flam3Serializer.swift", "Sources/FlameKit/RenderTypes.swift", "Sources/FlameReference/TemporalFilter.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter TemporalFilterTests --filter RealGenomePaletteTests --filter SerializerTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["temporal params parse (box/1.2, samples=1000)", "TemporalFilter box weights all == 1.0 (not 1/N)", "TemporalFilter box delta span == width", "TemporalFilter sumfilt box == 1.0", "TemporalFilter gaussian max-normalized to 1.0", "serializer round-trips", "Histogram.accumulate guards grid", "RenderParams.settingSamplesPerPixel preserves let/Sendable"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CPU temporal motion blur (faithful color_scalar + sumfilt)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ReferenceRenderer renders a motion-blurred frame by running N chaos sub-passes (one per sub-time) with per-pass colorScalar = weight baked into the dmap (rect.c:757, 778-782), accumulating into one Histogram, then DE + tone-map ONCE with sumfilt threaded into k2 (rect.c:937). Cost-neutral (rect.c:833).

**Files:** Modify Sources/FlameReference/ChaosGame.swift (add isaacSeed: + colorScalar: params on iterate, threaded into existing buildDmap call); Sources/FlameReference/ReferenceRenderer.swift (add render(blendAt:centerTime:temporal:sumfilt:params:)); Sources/FlameReference/ToneMapping.swift (add sumfilt: Double = 1.0 param, thread into k2). Create Tests/FlameReferenceTests/TemporalBlurTests.swift.

**Faithfulness invariants (load-bearing):** (a) color_scalar is baked into dmap BEFORE iteration — colors+alpha are weighted via the dmap lookup; (b) count increments UNWEIGHTED regardless of filter type (rect.c:501-505); (c) per-pass ISAAC seed must vary — ChaosGame.iterate otherwise pins to goldenIsaacSeed, so N calls with same flame+params produce identical trajectories. Salt per-pass with "emberweftgoldens-tmp\(i)". (d) Integer remainder (samplesPerPixel % N) distributed across first `rem` passes for exact total budget. (e) sampleDensity passed to ToneMapping is the ORIGINAL samplesPerPixel (NOT perPass), matching flam3's k2 formula (rect.c:935-937).

**Acceptance Criteria:** temporalSamples=1 byte-identical to plain render (same isaacSeed default + colorScalar=1.0); constant blendAt with N box samples → mean channel within 5% of plain render (sumfilt=1 → no brightness shift for box); make test-fast green.

**Verify:** swift test --filter TemporalBlurTests && make test-fast

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/FlameReference/ChaosGame.swift", "Sources/FlameReference/ReferenceRenderer.swift", "Sources/FlameReference/ToneMapping.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter TemporalBlurTests && make test-fast", "acceptanceCriteria": ["temporalSamples=1 byte-identical to plain", "static box blur preserves total light within 5%", "per-pass isaacSeed varies (correlated-stream test)", "sumfilt threaded into k2", "test-fast green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Metal temporal motion blur (N fused chaos passes, per-pass seeds)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MetalRenderer renders a motion-blurred frame by encoding N fused chaos passes (one per sub-time genome, perPassThreads = threadCount/N each, per-pass threadSeeds REGENERATED to avoid correlated streams) into the SAME atomicBuf, then a single decode→DE→log→display. Cost-neutral; box filter (default) per-pass colorScalar=1.0 → dmap byte-identical to single-pass.

**Files:** Modify Sources/FlameRenderer/MetalRenderer.swift (add render(blendAt:centerTime:temporal:sumfilt:params:), modeled on renderFused). Create Tests/FlameRendererTests/TemporalBlurMetalTests.swift.

**Key implementation points (verify each against MetalRenderer.swift:renderFused):** (a) shared payload (device/library/queue via fusedPipelines(); display params with sumfilt in k2; DE params; atomicBuf cleared ONCE; floatBufA/B; accumRGB/A/outBuf) built from the CENTER flame; (b) chaos dispatch replaced by a loop over `temporal` — per pass: re-pack xforms/final/distrib, REBUILD dmap via buildDmap(... colorScalar: sub.weight), REGENERATE seedsBuf via MetalHost.buildThreadSeeds(seed: params.seed &+ UInt64(i), threadCount: perPassThreads), update fp.threadCount/iterationsPerThread/remainder for per-pass budget, encode into the SAME uncleared atomicBuf; (c) perPassThreads kept a multiple of MetalHost.threadsPerGroup so dispatch has no integer remainder; (d) colorScale (uint32 fixed-point atomic normalizer) uses the FULL budget T = width*height*samplesPerPixel — do NOT change it per pass; (e) decode/DE/log/display unchanged; (f) GUARD at function top: if any temporal.weight != 1.0 → fatalError (gaussian/exp temporal on Metal not yet wired; box covers all real genomes).

**Acceptance Criteria:** Metal temporalSamples=1 == plain Metal render (byte-identical); FusedUnfusedParityTests still passes (temporal=1 unchanged); 2-sheep Metal render with --temporal-samples 8 (box) renders non-black; Metal render(blendAt:…, gaussian, …) fails loudly.

**Verify:** swift test --filter TemporalBlurMetalTests --filter FusedUnfusedParityTests (sandbox OFF — MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice returns nil under bash sandbox)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/FlameRenderer/MetalRenderer.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter TemporalBlurMetalTests --filter FusedUnfusedParityTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Metal temporalSamples=1 byte-identical to plain", "FusedUnfusedParity passes", "box temporal-samples=8 non-black", "gaussian temporal on Metal fails loudly"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: --temporal-samples in animate + production validation (USER GATE)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptanceCriterion is re-validated independently with captured output.

**Goal:** Wire motion blur into emberweft animate (--temporal-samples N), re-render a real-genome clip at production settings, visually verify the transition→loop jump is gone, motion is relaxing, comparable to official videos.

**Files:** Modify Sources/EmberweftCLI/AnimateCommand.swift (render loop ~182-222).

**Real symbols verified (no placeholders):** mapping.kind: Segment.Kind, segment.fromSheep, segment.toSheep, mapping.blend (∈ (0,1]), mapping.segmentId — all from Schedule.frameToBlend + Schedule.segment. Loop.blend(_:t:cycles:) and Transition.blend(_:_:t:stagger:) signatures confirmed. MainActor.assumeIsolated { autoreleasepool { … } } is the EXISTING pattern in AnimateCommand.swift:217 (the CLAUDE.md warning is for @MainActor TEST methods capturing self, not static functions like animate(_:); safe to match).

**Boundary PSNR math:** with --frames 160 --segments 3, schedule emits 480 frames: seg 0 loop A = 0..159, seg 1 transition A→B = 160..319, seg 2 loop B = 320..479. Boundary = 319→320; within-loop baseline = 100→101.

**Acceptance Criteria:** --temporal-samples parses N (default 1; if absent AND on CPU, use the genome's quality.temporalSamples); Metal caps N at 64 with a printed warning; CPU honors genome value uncapped ("slow meditative production"); blendAt closure + temporal render path; clip rendered (2 sheep 05739→31943, --frames 160 --segments 3 --loop-cycles 1 --temporal-samples 32 --quality 500 --size 1280x720 --backend metal) muxed to /tmp/m3_mb.mp4; boundary PSNR (319→320) within ~2dB of within-loop (100→101) — jump gone; user visual: smooth/relaxing + matches /tmp/es_official/ official videos.

**Verify:** render + ffmpeg mux + boundary PSNR (capture both numbers as evidence tokens); open /tmp/m3_mb.mp4 + official videos.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/EmberweftCLI/AnimateCommand.swift"], "verifyCommand": "render + boundary PSNR + open", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flag parses (default genome value on CPU, cap 64 on Metal)", "blendAt closure uses real mapping.kind/segment.fromSheep/toSheep symbols", "temporal render path dispatched when N>1", "clip to /tmp/m3_mb.mp4", "boundary PSNR within 2dB (jump gone)", "user visual smooth + matches official"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["boundary-psnr"], ["within-loop-psnr"]], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Density-gap diagnostic (localize the ≈20 dB)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Localize WHERE Emberweft's density distribution diverges from flam3 on a real genome (~20 dB PSNR), giving Task 6 a concrete target. Hypothesis: Emberweft chaos histogram is peakier.

**Files:** Create Tools/density_diff.py, Tools/density_diff.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** density_diff.py renders 00256 (no blur, matched: 800x592, oversample=1, estimator_radius=0, same seed/isaac_seed, q1000) in both Emberweft CPU + flam3 (flam3-render env-driven: format=png nthreads=1 in=<path> out=<path> seed=S isaac_seed=SS — same pattern as Tools/regen_goldens.sh:84-89; sanitize via the same regex approach as Flam3Oracle.injectMotionBlurOff plus estimator_radius=0 supersample=1), prints brightness histogram (>=8 buckets), % above {4,32,128}, centroid + active bbox; density_diff.md states divergent region + ranked causes (chaos distribution / DE curve / k2-sampleDensity / spatial filter).

**Verify:** python3 Tools/density_diff.py prints both distributions; .md documents localization.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Tools/density_diff.py", "Tools/density_diff.md"], "verifyCommand": "python3 Tools/density_diff.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders both with matched sanitized params", "prints histogram/thresholds/centroid/bbox", "md localizes region + ranks causes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Fix density gap + gated real-genome vs-flam3 parity test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Close the localized density difference so real-genome PSNR vs flam3 reaches >=38 dB, locked by a gated parity test.

**Files:** Modify Sources/FlameReferenceTests/Flam3Oracle.swift (add renderStatic wrapper around flam3-render, env-var-driven per regen_goldens.sh:84-89). Modify whatever Task 5 localized (likely ChaosGame.swift / DensityEstimation.swift / ToneMapping.swift). Create Tests/FlameReferenceTests/RealGenomeParityTests.swift.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Flam3Oracle.renderStatic(genomePath:outPath:seed:isaacSeed:nthreads:) helper added; RealGenomeParityTests renders each Tests/Goldens/genomes_real/ fixture (CPU, no blur, sanitized: temporal_samples=1 supersample=1 estimator_radius=0 estimator_minimum=0) vs live flam3-render, asserts PSNR>=38 dB + SSIM>=0.95 (XCTSkip if oracle absent — F10 contract); red before (~20 dB) / green after; GoldenParity still >= 30 dB; test-fast green.

**Verify:** swift test --filter RealGenomeParityTests (>=38 dB) && swift test --filter GoldenParityTests (unchanged).

**Note:** Task 6 Step 4 (the actual fix) is intentionally conditional on Task 5's diagnostic — the candidate ranked #1 in Tools/density_diff.md is the target. The acceptance criteria (PSNR>=38 + no GoldenParity regression) are concrete and testable regardless of which fix lands.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Tests/FlameReferenceTests/Flam3Oracle.swift", "Tests/FlameReferenceTests/RealGenomeParityTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter RealGenomeParityTests && swift test --filter GoldenParityTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Flam3Oracle.renderStatic helper added", "RealGenomeParity >=38dB/0.95SSIM across all fixtures", "red before green after", "GoldenParity >=30dB, test-fast green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
